entries.theme: AI tools for structured thinking and productivity
entries.description: Multiple newsletters covering Claude/AI tools not just for output speed but for improving judgment and structured thinking (Socratic Explorer, Brutal Critic, Pre-Mortem). AI gains are more modest than expected due to SDLC bottlenecks.

entries.theme: Externalising tacit knowledge with AI agents
entries.description: The idea of encoding expert knowledge into AI agents (CLAUDE.md, knowledge bases) so it doesn't live only in one person's head — seen in both Platform PM and agile/engineering contexts.
Themes around overcoming self-limiting beliefs (spotlight effect), navigating performance reviews, and building leadership skills in an AI-changed landscape.
